below-gate.purpose: Make sure the app stays quiet when nearby deals are not worth interrupting you.
below-gate.summary: 4 shops with modest offers. Walk near them — you should not get a deal alert.
passCriteria: The app treated nearby deals as too weak for an alert (or blocked one)

playbook.do: Run scenario on Mac — phones fresh-install automatically (walk-test + field log). Deal alerts ON. All categories enabled.
Set the walk centre on the map → Run scenario. You should see 4 shop pins (6 offers total).
Enter the orange circle. Stand near a pin for at least 3 minutes.
Pull the feed to refresh near the shops. Do not redeem.
Settings → Deal alert test log → Upload log.
On this page: Load cloud log → Check log. Must pass.
Tap Finish & remove — only after the log check passes.

below-gate.cleanupWhen: After the log check passes, tap Finish & remove.

walk-allow.purpose: Make sure a real walk near several good shops can qualify for a deal alert.
walk-allow.summary: 12 shops (coffee, food, fashion, beauty). Walk between pins and linger — the app should see enough value nearby.
passCriteria: Nearby deals were strong enough together that the app would consider alerting you
You were walking or standing still — not driving past
No “you’re driving” block in the log

playbook.do: On Mac: fresh install for this phone (Dev Console → Real iPhones). Then deal alerts ON.
Tick this phone under Prepare phones, set walk centre → Run scenario.
Walk between pins (do not drive). Stay near a cluster for at least 5 minutes.
Refresh the feed while walking. Upload the test log after a few minutes.
Load cloud log → Check log. Must pass.
Tap Finish & remove — only after the log check passes.

walk-allow.cleanupWhen: After the log check passes, tap Finish & remove.

lunch-corridor.purpose: Lunch-time walk with mostly food and coffee shops — alerts should still work on a realistic corridor.
lunch-corridor.summary: 7 shops skewed to lunch (coffee + food). Midday walk near the pins.
passCriteria: Enough interesting lunch deals nearby while you were on foot
Normal alert path (not blocked as driving)

playbook.do: Deal alerts on. All categories enabled.
Run scenario at your real lunch walk area.
Walk the corridor between pins. Dwell near food shops 5+ minutes.
Refresh feed and upload test log.

lunch-corridor.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

food-affinity-3day.purpose: After you redeem at a bakery three days in a row, day 4 walks should favour similar food offers.
food-affinity-3day.summary: Multi-day: bakery anchor + fillers. Redeem bakery days 1–3, walk day 4.
passCriteria: Day 4 log shows food/coffee leaning after prior redeems
Document each day in notes when finishing the run
food-affinity-3day.cleanupWhen: Only Finish & remove after all days in the playbook are done.

category-off.purpose: If you turn Coffee off in settings, coffee shops must not drive alert copy.
category-off.summary: 5 coffee-heavy shops. Turn Coffee category off, then walk.
passCriteria: Coffee offers excluded from alert reasoning
category-off.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

driving-suppress.purpose: Driving past many shops must not trigger walking-style deal alerts.
driving-suppress.summary: 12 shops along a route. Drive through (do not walk).
passCriteria: Driving suppress rule recorded in log
driving-suppress.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

walk-in-reenter.purpose: First visit can alert; leaving and coming back should follow the re-entry rules (INT-04).
walk-in-reenter.summary: 4 shops in a ring. Walk in, leave, walk back in.
passCriteria: First entry logged with offers seen
Re-entry behaviour matches spec (no duplicate spam)
walk-in-reenter.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

blacklist-merchant.purpose: A shop you blocked must never appear in alerts or feed for that walk.
blacklist-merchant.summary: 4 shops — one is blacklisted on the phone before the walk.
passCriteria: Blacklisted shop absent from alert/feed evidence
blacklist-merchant.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

transit-suppress.purpose: Train or transit movement must not trigger high-street walking alerts.
transit-suppress.summary: Shops near a rail corridor. Test on train or fast transit past pins.
transit-suppress.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

quiet-allow.purpose: Dense retail can use a quieter delivery path — still allow when rules say yes.
quiet-allow.summary: Many retail pins in a busy area. Walk and dwell normally.
passCriteria: Allow or quiet path — not wrongly suppressed
quiet-allow.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

bootstrap-day3.purpose: Early app days: by day 3 lunch walk, engine should have enough signal for a sensible alert.
bootstrap-day3.summary: Multi-day bootstrap through day 3 lunch walk.
passCriteria: Day 3 lunch walk log matches bootstrap expectations
bootstrap-day3.cleanupWhen: Finish only after full multi-day playbook complete.

bootstrap-handoff.purpose: Day 6 handoff — engine memory from prior days should still behave on a routine walk.
bootstrap-handoff.summary: Multi-day bootstrap through day 6 handoff walk.
passCriteria: Handoff day log shows stable memory behaviour
bootstrap-handoff.cleanupWhen: Finish only after full multi-day playbook complete.

lunch-ignore-3day.purpose: Ignoring lunch alerts three days should reduce lunch noise on day 4.
lunch-ignore-3day.summary: Multi-day: ignore lunch pings days 1–3, walk day 4.
passCriteria: Day 4 shows reduced or adjusted lunch alerting after ignores
lunch-ignore-3day.cleanupWhen: Finish only after multi-day steps complete.

parcel-run.purpose: Errand walk (parcel/post) with food nearby — serendipity without wrong intent.
parcel-run.summary: Mixed errand + food pins. Walk the errand route.
parcel-run.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

context-block-6h.purpose: Same café twice in one day — second visit within 6 hours should be context-blocked.
context-block-6h.summary: 1 café anchor + fillers. Morning walk, same pin 6+ hours later.
passCriteria: Repeat within block window suppressed appropriately
context-block-6h.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

real-outing-walk.purpose: Walking away from home for 5+ minutes should count as a real outing.
real-outing-walk.summary: 12 shops. Walk beyond your learned home radius.
real-outing-walk.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

visit-wake.purpose: Background visit/geofence should update memory without opening the app.
visit-wake.summary: Dwell 5–15 min at a pin with app backgrounded.
visit-wake.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

engagement-cooldown.purpose: After feed use, alerts must pause 3h even at high score.
engagement-cooldown.summary: Walk for score ≥70, scroll feed (not map), trigger another wake — defer, no alert.
engagement-cooldown.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

map-engagement-cooldown.purpose: After map pan or pin tap, alerts must pause 3h even at high score.
map-engagement-cooldown.summary: Walk for score ≥70, pan map or tap pin, trigger another wake — defer, no alert.
map-engagement-cooldown.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

activity-wake.purpose: Walk→drive while backgrounded should wake the engine.
activity-wake.summary: Transition on foot to car without opening the app.
activity-wake.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

wifi-anchor-hint.purpose: Known home/office Wi‑Fi should strengthen anchor hints.
wifi-anchor-hint.summary: At learned home — leave on foot or arrive on known Wi‑Fi.
wifi-anchor-hint.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

car-to-walk.purpose: Park and walk shortly after driving should log carToWalk.
car-to-walk.summary: Drive to car park, walk to shops within 15 min.
car-to-walk.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

anchor-opportunity-ring.purpose: Near learned home with offers in the notification ring.
anchor-opportunity-ring.summary: Seed shops within ring of your home anchor.
anchor-opportunity-ring.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.

commute-corridor.purpose: Repeat weekday commute learns station clusters and on-time corridor.
commute-corridor.summary: Multi-day commute; walk route on weekday in usual window.
commute-corridor.cleanupWhen: After log check passes, Finish & remove.
